brand.name: Ridge
brand.description: Ridge is an everyday carry brand that specializes in minimalist, RFID-blocking wallets and accessories. It is known for using premium, durable materials like titanium and carbon fiber to improve daily carry items.

identity.mission: We launched The Ridge with a simple belief — that we could make wallets better. ... we're here to improve all the items you carry daily.

audience.description: Individuals seeking minimalist, durable, and high-quality everyday carry items.
